title: paramuthia #3889
definition:
1) any address, whether made for the purpose of persuading, or
    of arousing and stimulating, or of calming and consoling
    1a) consolation, comfort
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) any address, whether made for the purpose of persuading, or
    of arousing and stimulating, or of calming and consoling
    1a) consolation, comfort

    NASB:  encouragement, exhortation, comfort:
